TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tayak plahan ka tatak aring sraral qani hya ga, ini kta iyal misu qani la, nanu' yasa qu cyux naha' kblayun kya qalang na ulay kya Momoyama song misu qani. s'agal naha kkbalay balay Tayal sraral, nanu' pshiluq quw hiluq . ya qasa lga, mpcisal kya qu Tayal lga, niwan nuyx nya pksawbihun uziy qu inlungan na Tayal uziy. ru ktan kya uziy qu ppsbaq 'laqi' gaga na Tayal uziy. niwan nyux nya' pslhingun p'ubuy uziy qu gaga qnxan Tayal sraral uziy.
S.PHON: tajak plańßan ka tatak ariŇč s~…ēraral qani ńßja …£a, ini kta ijal mis~…ēu qani la, nanu Ē jas~…ēa qu ¶~ ®jux nańßa Ē kő≤lajun kja qalaŇč na ulaj kja momojama s~…ēoŇč mis~…ēu qani. s~…ē Ēa…£al nańßa kkő≤alaj ő≤alaj tajal s~…ēraral, nanu Ē ps~…ēńßiluq quw ńßiluq . ja qas~…ēa l…£a, mp ¶~ ®is~…ēal kja qu tajal l…£a, niwan nujx nja pks~…ēawő≤ińßun uzij qu inluŇčan na tajal uzij. ru ktan kja uzij qu pps~…ēő≤aq Ēlaqi Ē …£a…£a na tajal uzij. niwan njux nja Ē ps~…ēlńßiŇčun p Ēuő≤uj uzij qu …£a…£a qnxan tajal s~…ēraral uzij.
S.FORM: Tayak plahan ka tatak aring sraral qani hya ga, ini kta iyal misu qani la, nanu' yasa qu cyux naha' kblayun kya qalang na ulay kya Momoyama song misu qani. s'agal naha kkbalay balay Tayal sraral, nanu' pshiluq quw hiluq . ya qasa lga, mpcisal kya qu Tayal lga, niwan nuyx nya pksawbihun uziy qu inlungan na Tayal uziy. ru ktan kya uziy qu ppsbaq 'laqi' gaga na Tayal uziy. niwan nyux nya' pslhingun p'ubuy uziy qu gaga qnxan Tayal sraral uziy.
S.PHON: tajak plańßan ka tatak ariŇč s~…ēraral qani ńßja …£a, ini kta ijal mis~…ēu qani la, nanu Ē jas~…ēa qu ¶~ ®jux nańßa Ē kő≤lajun kja qalaŇč na ulaj kja momojama s~…ēoŇč mis~…ēu qani. s~…ē Ēa…£al nańßa kkő≤alaj ő≤alaj tajal s~…ēraral, nanu Ē ps~…ēńßiluq quw ńßiluq . ja qas~…ēa l…£a, mp ¶~ ®is~…ēal kja qu tajal l…£a, niwan nujx nja pks~…ēawő≤ińßun uzij qu inluŇčan na tajal uzij. ru ktan kja uzij qu pps~…ēő≤aq Ēlaqi Ē …£a…£a na tajal uzij. niwan njux nja Ē ps~…ēlńßiŇčun p Ēuő≤uj uzij qu …£a…£a qnxan tajal s~…ēraral uzij.
